title: TLECacheEntry
description: A single Two-Line Element set cached locally, with epoch age discipline enforced. Ruled binding in Session 3 (aggregator-vs-source) and Session 4 (rate-of-change gate).

known_failure_modes: Treating an aggregator (n2yo) as the primary source. Aggregator MUST be named separately from primary.
Using a TLE past ~3 days without degrading confidence — position error grows nonlinearly under drag.
Bulk-redistributing Space-Track-derived TLEs. CI rate-of-change gate blocks this at the repo level.

norad_cat_id.description: The NORAD catalog ID. This is canonical, not the aggregator's 57-category taxonomy.

tle_line1.description: Line 1 of the TLE, exactly 69 characters per NORAD spec.

tle_line2.description: Line 2 of the TLE, exactly 69 characters per NORAD spec.

epoch_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC of the TLE's own epoch (parsed from line 1).

epoch_age_days_at_fetch.description: Age of the TLE at fetch time, in days. Consumers MUST degrade confidence past 3.0.

primary.description: The authoritative record. USSPACECOM/Space-Track is the state catalog.

aggregator.description: Named separately from primary. When null, primary was fetched directly.

license_binding.description: The most restrictive binding in the provenance chain sets the ceiling.

sgp4_ready.description: True if the TLE was validated for SGP4 propagation locally (checksums verified, ranges sane).
